headline: Is It Time To Reassess KKR (KKR) After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: If you are wondering whether KKR at around US$90.94 is a bargain or just fairly priced, you are asking the right question. This article is built to help you frame that clearly. KKR's share price has seen mixed returns, with a 0.4% move over the last week, an 11.9% decline over the past month, a 29.4% decline year to date, but gains of 86.6% over 3 years and 92.4% over 5 years. These swings have kept KKR on many investors' watchlists, as long-term returns sit alongside more recent weakness...
